title: RC7260 GST/HST and QST Return for Purchase of Real Property/Immovable or Carbon Emission Allowances by a Selected Listed Financial Institution - Canada.ca
content:
## RC7260 GST/HST and QST Return for Purchase of Real Property/Immovable or Carbon Emission Allowances by a Selected Listed Financial Institution
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this return to report and pay the GST/HST and/or the QST (referred to as an immovable for QST purposes) when you purchase taxable real property or you purchase taxable supplies of emission allowances that are made in Canada, if you are either an SLFI for QST purposes, or an SLFI only for GST/HST purposes that has QST reporting requirements.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7260-fill-25e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc7260-fill-25e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc7260-25e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc7260-25e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
